results.analysis: 滿分護城河 — Google Search 90%+市佔率 + 數據網絡效應 + AI全棧。Forward PE 21.5x為Mag7最平，但$200B Capex令FCF受壓。概率加權fair value $355，現價$317.69有+11.8% upside。入場zone $310-320。
results.catalyst: $200B FY2026 Capex引發-7.1%拋售 — Forward PE 21.5x為Mag7最平估值, AI全棧能力（DeepMind + Gemini + TPU + Cloud + Search）全球最完整, Revenue +24.2% YoY加速中, 概率加權Fair Value $355（+11.8% upside）, AI Overviews + Vertex AI + Cloud AI貨幣化即將來臨, Fortress balance sheet — $67.5B net cash
results.rationale: AI capex fear creates entry opportunity. $200B is an investment, not an expense. Market will re-rate once AI monetization becomes visible. Fortress balance sheet provides downside protection.
